testcase.name: A1: gvt --version prints version and exits 0
A2: gvt --help prints usage and exits 0
A3: gvt outside git repo errors with exit 1
A4: gvt opens TUI for valid file
A5: gvt with missing file errors with exit 1
A8: gvt in empty repo exited without crash
A9: qq exits gvt cleanly
A10: single q shows quit confirmation modal
A11: SIGTERM handled (process terminated)

skipped.message: terminal-corruption is expected; user-recoverable via stty sane

testcase.name: A13: Ctrl+C handled by Textual (app stays alive, expected)
G1: gvt.log created at /home/trustycage/.config/gvt/gvt.log
G2: DEBUG lines written with GVT_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG
G3: warning/error logged for corrupt ref
G4: log rotation occurred (gvt.log.1 exists)
G5: gvt exited cleanly with read-only log dir
I1: gvt launches despite corrupt ref
I2: gvt shows HEAD in detached state
I3: gvt survived .git/HEAD deletion mid-session
I4

skipped.message: external commit during session — out of scope

testcase.name: I5
